case_title: MANCHANG ZHU VS. CITY ANDN COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHU, MANCHANG AS TO DEFENDANT CITY ANDN COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-08-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-06-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-24-2009
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-01-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-01-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ROGER L. SISNEROS, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-01-2009 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-02-2009. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-16-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-08-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-16-2010 CONTINUED TO APR-19-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S), OR DISMISS. THE FEB-16-2010 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ZHU, MANCHANG

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-19-2010 CONTINUED TO JUN-21-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-19-2010 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY ANDN COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-21-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHU, MANCHANG SERVED APR-12-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY ANDN COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
